# Docker Compose Template: Node.js / TypeScript Stack

```yaml
# {System Name} — Development Infrastructure
# Generated by AI-DWG | Stack: Node.js + TypeScript
#
# Usage: docker compose up -d
# Tear down: docker compose down -v

version: "3.8"

services:
  postgres:
    image: postgres:{version}
    container_name: ${PROJECT_NAME}_postgres
    ports:
      - "5432:5432"
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: ${DB_NAME}
      POSTGRES_USER: ${DB_USER}
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: ${DB_PASSWORD}
    volumes:
      - postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U ${DB_USER}"]
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 3

  redis:
    image: redis:{version}-alpine
    container_name: ${PROJECT_NAME}_redis
    ports:
      - "6379:6379"
    volumes:
      - redis_data:/data
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "redis-cli", "ping"]
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 3

  # Uncomment if search engine needed:
  # elasticsearch:
  #   image: elasticsearch:{version}
  #   container_name: ${PROJECT_NAME}_elasticsearch
  #   ports:
  #     - "9200:9200"
  #   environment:
  #     - discovery.type=single-node
  #     - "ES_JAVA_OPTS=-Xms512m -Xmx512m"
  #   volumes:
  #     - es_data:/usr/share/elasticsearch/data

  # Uncomment if message broker needed:
  # rabbitmq:
  #   image: rabbitmq:{version}-management-alpine
  #   container_name: ${PROJECT_NAME}_rabbitmq
  #   ports:
  #     - "5672:5672"
  #     - "15672:15672"
  #   healthcheck:
  #     test: ["CMD", "rabbitmq-diagnostics", "check_running"]

volumes:
  postgres_data:
  redis_data:
  # es_data:

networks:
  default:
    name: ${PROJECT_NAME}_network
```

## Conditional Services

| Service | Include IF |
|---------|-----------|
| postgres | DB = PostgreSQL (almost always) |
| redis | Cache or queue specified |
| elasticsearch | Search engine = Elasticsearch |
| rabbitmq | Message broker = RabbitMQ |
| minio | Object storage specified |
| mailpit | Email notifications in architecture |
